__sample: SRR28623786 — Mycobacterium tuberculosis complex (M. bovis-group) Illumina reads
__note: Validated at genus level: Kraken2 places ~96% of reads in Mycobacterium (M. tuberculosis complex, 94.9%). Species-rank reads fragment across the near-identical MTBC members (M. orygis/tuberculosis/...), so species is not asserted — that's a known Kraken limitation, not a tool fault.
